selection_basis.ledger_reason: Parent batch was the strongest remaining work-surface blockage packet on the controller action board.
selection_basis.bounded_goal: Reduce the autowiggle zero-canon blockage and first external lane workaround packet into controller-facing failure and routing fences.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Strongest immediate follow-on once the blockage packet is narrowed.
Strongest next compact grammar/admissibility packet after the current work-surface pair.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent already isolates the blockage packet, raw drift, fail-closed shell, and offload workaround tightly enough for a bounded controller-facing reduction.

candidate_items.name: CANON_ASCENT_REQUIRES_EMISSION_LADDER_NOT_CHURN
candidate_items.why_candidate: Turns the parent blockage class into a controller gate against mistaking churn for canonical ascent.

candidate_items.name: SUMMARY_MECHANICAL_RAW_TRIANGULATION_KEEPER
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the parent diagnostic method instead of flattening blockage reads to one cleaned story.

candidate_items.name: PROBE_PASS_AND_RESCUE_VOLUME_ARE_NOT_ASCENT_PROOF
candidate_items.why_candidate: Compresses the parent's misleading positive signals into a controller gate against premature ascent claims.

candidate_items.name: FAIL_CLOSED_EXTERNAL_ROLE_SHELL_KEEPER
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the clean reusable packaging shell from the parent without treating it as repair proof.

candidate_items.name: OFFLOAD_COMPENSATION_IS_NOT_INTERNAL_REPAIR
candidate_items.why_candidate: Turns the parent workaround packet into a controller routing rule against confusing compensation with repair.

quarantined_items.name: RAW_COUNT_DRIFT_NORMALIZATION
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The raw count drift is part of the evidence signal, not a cosmetic defect to hide.

quarantined_items.name: SELECTOR_OUTPUT_AS_PROOF_OF_REPAIR
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The fail-closed wrapper still routes a live strategy path without proving internal maturity.

notes: This batch was produced after the earlier five controller-facing A2-mid reductions as the sixth bounded controller reduction in this audit pass.
No raw source reread and no active A2 append-save were performed.
